features.name: Nimble Escape
features.text: The goblin can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.

summary.description: The rank-and-file grunts of the Grimeback gang, a mid-tier goblin outfit operating out of the old waterworks district in the Blackstone sewers. They mark themselves with a streak of grey clay across their foreheads. Individually weak and cowardly, they rely on numbers and ambush tactics. Two weeks ago, the Grimebacks swarmed a group of wounded adventurers and killed them all, seizing three powerful magic items that have made the gang a terror in the tunnels.

legendsAndLore.text: Grimebacks are a mid-tier sewer gang identifiable by the grey clay streaks on their foreheads. They've become unusually aggressive in recent weeks.
The Grimebacks ambushed a party of surface adventurers and stole powerful magic items. Their boss, Mogrot the Wide, is planning a full-scale raid on Snotrocket territory.

encounters.description: Found throughout the Grimeback stronghold known as the Dripfort, a fortified defunct pumping station, and occasionally on patrol in the Blackflow tunnels.

groups.creatures: 1d4 Grimeback goblins in general shacks (sleeping after 10 PM)
groups.treasure: 2d6 cp each, one goblin trinket per shack

groups.creatures: 5-8 Grimeback goblins at the gambling den or barbery, sometimes mixed with Grimeback thugs
groups.treasure: Copper pieces and small trinkets from gambling stakes

behavior.text: Sleeping in piles on rag beds in their shacks.
Gambling at the dice table or playing Rat Race.
Drinking sludge-wine at the barbery and watching haircuts.
Hauling food from the larder to the kitchens.
